_comment: BigBoyAgent TQC Backtest Space | Taha Iqbal

_env_vars.BACKTEST_SECRET: REQUIRED — shared API key authenticating executor requests. Set as a HuggingFace Space secret environment variable. Never hardcode in this file.
_env_vars.PORT: OPTIONAL — HTTP listening port (default: 7860). Must match the EXPOSE directive in the Dockerfile and the executor's BACKTEST_URL.

_config_fields.note: All fields below are optional. Omit any field to use the built-in default shown in the comment. Fields that are present override the default at startup.

initial_balance.description: Starting account balance for every backtest and each walk-forward fold.

risk_pct.description: Fraction of current balance risked per trade. Feeds into GARCH-scaled margin computation.

leverage.description: Notional leverage multiplier applied to margin. notional = margin * leverage.

sl_atr_mult.description: Stop-loss distance expressed as a multiple of the bar's ATR. sl_dist = ATR * sl_atr_mult.

tp_rr_ratio.description: Take-profit reward-to-risk ratio. tp_dist = sl_dist * tp_rr_ratio.

min_confidence.description: Minimum Brain signal confidence required to open a position. Signals below this threshold are ignored.

fee_pct.description: Taker fee rate applied symmetrically on open and close. Total round-trip fee = 2 * fee_pct * notional.

slip_pct.description: One-way slippage estimate. Applied adversely: long entries fill higher, short entries fill lower.

max_open.description: Maximum number of simultaneously open positions across all symbols. Hard cap: min(max_open, 8).
